summary: Full backend and frontend testing of IT Operations Dashboard. All 19 backend API tests passed. All 7 pages load and function correctly. Minor issues found: sidebar nav uses data-testid='nav-vendors' (not 'nav-status' as noted in review request), Canton WH shows 0 circuits due to name mismatch between SITES_DATA and circuit data.

minor.issue: Canton WH site shows 0 circuits. SITES_DATA uses name 'Canton WH' but circuits collection uses 'Canton Warehouse'. The lowercase comparison 'canton wh' != 'canton warehouse' causes circuit_count to be 0 for Canton WH site.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid for Service Status nav item is 'nav-vendors' not 'nav-status' as mentioned in review request. The sidebar label shows 'VENDORS'.
6 vendor cards shown instead of 5 - includes an extra 'IsItDown.right' external tool card that is not from the backend API

issues: Remus and Mt. Pleasant site labels overlap on map due to close coordinates - both labeled at same position

action_items: Fix Canton WH name mismatch: SITES_DATA has 'Canton WH' but circuit seeded with 'Canton Warehouse' - align one or the other for proper circuit association
Consider renaming sidebar nav item testid from 'nav-vendors' to 'nav-status' for consistency with route /status
critical_code_review_comments: Canton WH site shows 0 circuits because sites matching uses SITES_DATA name 'Canton WH' but circuit data uses 'Canton Warehouse' - they don't match case-insensitively
ServiceStatus page renders 6 cards (5 vendors + 1 IsItDown.right external tool) - the frontend hardcodes an extra card not from backend
Vendor status returns 'unknown' for all vendors which is EXPECTED per spec (external URLs unreachable in this env)

success_rate.frontend: 95% - all pages load and core flows work

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows tested and working. Backend 100% passing. Key issues: (1) Canton WH shows 0 circuits due to name mismatch in site matching logic, (2) sidebar uses nav-vendors not nav-status testid. Dashboard KPI shows 4 active alerts, 6/8 circuits, 5 tickets. All CRUD ops work for alerts, circuits, tickets. Settings save works. Network map shows all 8 sites.
